title: adenocline pauciflora var. humilis
intro: Adenocline pauciflora var. humilis, also known as a dwarf or shrub-like form of the Adenocline pauciflora plant, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. The plant's leaves and stems have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Some of the health benefits associated with Adenocline pauciflora var. humilis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are typically used to treat various ailments, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
